title: Trump’s UFO release could include videos, photos of non-human craft proving we aren’t alone: source
description: The former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense Intelligence tells The Post the government’s trove of UFO docs is massive and includes out-of-this-world photos and video that could take the subject "to another level."

title: 25 Things You Don’t Know About Kurt Russell: Goldie Hawn, Princess Diana, UFO Discovery and More
description: In honor of Kurt Russell’s milestone 75th birthday on Tuesday, March 17, Us Weekly is breaking down some interesting facts about the legendary actor. title: Shocking New Details Emerge in Search for Missing UFO Expert

title: Eerie Trio of UFO Baffles Experts After Video Shows Mysterious Lights Moving in Formation Above New York City
description: A video of three mysterious lights over New York City has sparked debate about UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena. Discover the theories and watch the footage.
